char_dialogue: Great job defeating GELATON! its been years since someone has accomplished that.
Thanks, I feel like you could've prepared us a bit better...
yeah! that was like totally not fair?
Anyways, we dont have much time, theres still alot for yall to learn!
We are surrounded by molten chocolate, lucky for you, you can create platforms by splashing milk onto the chocolate.
To refill the bucket, go to the [WATER FAUCET] and press [E]
Thats good and all, but where is my bucket? SCARLET is the only one with a bucket.
You can throw items by [HOLDING DOWN F] with it equipped.
Good luck and I'll see you in the next room.
